true_desc_levels.1: Attacks an enemy.\nThis skill deals more damage the higher your <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color> is.\nIf the target has the Fire attribute, decreases their Priority by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>.
true_desc_levels.2: Attacks an enemy.\nThis skill deals more damage the higher your <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color> is.\nIf the target has the Fire attribute, decreases their Priority by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>.

true_desc_levels.1_jp: 敵単体にダメージを与える。\n自分の<color=#28d9ed>スピード</color>が高いほどダメージが増加する。\n対象が<color=#28d9ed>火属性</color>の場合、行動ゲージを<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>DOWNさせる。

true_desc_levels.1: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>40%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Frozen</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.\nDamage dealt increases proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color>.
